content.text: I'm overhauling billing — splitting line-item totals across multiple ledgers and need to wire the proration logic carefully.
Outline accepted. I'll touch src/billing/proration.ts and add ledger-split tests.
Use a midpoint rounding strategy; legal needs penny-level audit trails per ledger.
Adopting midpoint rounding and emitting per-ledger audit events from src/billing/ledger.ts.
That's underspecified — could you confirm which part of the proration flow you'd like me to act on next?
Implement the ledger-split proration as discussed, with midpoint rounding and per-ledger audit events; reuse the existing audit writer.
Implemented the proration split with midpoint rounding and wired audit events through src/billing/audit.ts.
Also update the customer-facing invoice template to reflect the split — keep wording neutral, follow our existing tone guide.
Updated the invoice template to surface ledger splits using neutral wording from the tone guide.
